title: EverythingInOne
description: This mod has a lot of different and weird stuff ranging from tools, armor, machines, ore, and more!
body:
I have added many things, including machines, tools, armour, and food.

 

You can make companions with special effects like strength, speed, feather falling, etc.

 

If you want to live in a village, I have made a village locator so you can find one easily and a home teleporter to set a teleport location and teleport to it instantly.

 

I have added 3 machines to help you cook: the oven, stove, and microwave (all have JEI support). These are mainly used to get fresh fries, pizza, cupcakes, donuts, and maybe more in the future.

But those aren't the only machines; there is also the Tree Grinder and the Auto Fisher, as well as a way to get electricity from solar panels and a battery to store them.

 

There is super storage, so you can store more stuff in one box, and if that's not enough, I have added a backpack so you can store things while exploring, not needing to go back every time you need something.

 

And lastly, if you want a challenge, I recommend you try to get the Duplicator Machine. What it does is you put an item in the first slot, and it gives a stack of it in the other one, but at a very expensive cost.

It requires 4 compressed diamonds, 4 compressed netherite ingots and a compressed block that I don't want to say here since my brother made the name.

 

This was made in MCreator, so don't expect the best, but I still tried.
